## Reviewer Checklist

<!-- Reviewers: check these before approving. See EOS Section 10 for details. -->

- [ ] Solves the right problem with reasonable scope
- [ ] No data integrity, auth/permissions, or integration risks
- [ ] Follows established patterns and is maintainable
- [ ] Risk level matches approval rigor (high-risk changes need 2 reviewers)
- [ ] Tests cover the change adequately
